<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type simple_stop = [ `Full_content | `Percent of int | `Px of int ]
  type stop =
      [ `Full_content
      | `Interval of Tongue.simple_stop * Tongue.simple_stop
      | `Percent of int
      | `Px of int ]
  type tongue = {
    elt : Html_types.div Eliom.Content.Html.D.elt;
    stop_signal_before : Tongue.simple_stop React.S.t Eliom.Client_value.t;
    stop_signal_after : Tongue.simple_stop React.S.t Eliom.Client_value.t;
    swipe_pos : int React.S.t Eliom.Client_value.t;
    px_signal_before : int React.S.t Eliom.Client_value.t;
    px_signal_after : int React.S.t Eliom.Client_value.t;
  }
  val tongue :
    ?a:[< Html_types.div_attrib ] Eliom.Content.Html.attrib list ->
    ?side:[ `Bottom | `Left | `Right | `Top ] ->
    ?stops:Tongue.stop list ->
    ?init:Tongue.simple_stop ->
    ?handle:Html_types.div_content Eliom.Content.Html.elt ->
    ?update:Tongue.simple_stop React.event Eliom.Client_value.t ->
    [< Html_types.div_content_fun ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    Tongue.tongue
end >>
